steps.title: Require no real solutions
steps.content:
No real solutions require a negative discriminant:
$$8^2-4(1)(a+0.5)\lt0$$
$$64-4a-2\lt0$$
$$62\lt4a$$
$$a\gt15.5$$

steps.title: Choose the least integer
steps.content: The least positive integer greater than $15.5$ is required. The answer is 16.
